title: PHP Return Values
codeExample:
<?php
function calculate($a, $b, $op): int|float {
    return match ($op) {
        '+' => $a + $b,
        '-' => $a - $b,
        '*' => $a * $b,
        '/' => $b != 0 ? $a / $b : 0,
        default => 0
    };
}

echo calculate(10, 5, '+'); // 15
echo calculate(10, 5, '/'); // 2

// Early return example
function validate($value) {
    if (empty($value)) {
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}
?>

quiz.question: What keyword returns a value from a function?
How many values can a PHP function return?
